message:
chore: Add Python bytecode files to .gitignore

Add __pycache__/, *.pyc, and *.pyo to .gitignore to prevent Python
bytecode files from being accidentally committed.

The new Java JDBC helper (resource_lifecycle_java.py) generates __pycache__
when executed, and these compiled bytecode files should not be tracked in
version control.

Files ignored:
- __pycache__/ (Python 3 bytecode cache directories)
- *.pyc (compiled Python files)
- *.pyo (optimized Python bytecode files)

This follows Python best practices and prevents repository pollution with
auto-generated bytecode.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,9 @@ temp/
 
 # Python environments
 .venv/
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
+*.pyo
 
 # Rust build artifacts
 **/target/
